Jwt.Key: <gerar 32+ bytes aleatorios; via env Jwt__Key ou user-secrets>

BootstrapGestor.Name: Gestor ONG
BootstrapGestor.Cpf: <cpf do gestor; via env BootstrapGestor__Cpf ou user-secrets>
BootstrapGestor.Email: <email do gestor; via env BootstrapGestor__Email ou user-secrets>
BootstrapGestor.Password: <senha do gestor; via env BootstrapGestor__Password ou user-secrets>
